chunks.text: # CDRH New - News and Updates | FDA * [Skip to main content](https://www.fda.gov/medical-devices/medical-devices-news-and-events/cdrh-new-news-and-updates#main-content) * [Skip to FDA Search](https://www.fda.gov/medical-devices/medical-devices-news-and-events/cdrh-new-news-and-updates#search-form) * [Skip to in this section menu](https://www.fda.gov/medical-devices/medical-devices-news-and-events/cdrh-new-news-and-updates#section-nav) * [Skip to footer links](https://www.fda.gov/medical-devices/medical-devices-news-and-events/cdrh-new-news-and-updates#footer) ![Image 1: U.S. flag](https://www.fda.gov/themes/custom/preview/assets/images/US_Flag.png)An official website of the United States government[Here’s how you know](https://www.fda.gov/medical-devices/medical-devices-news-and-events/cdrh-new-news-and-updates#) ![Image 2: Dot gov](https://www.fda.gov/themes/custom/preview/assets/images/icon-dot-gov.svg) **The .gov means it’s official.** Federal government websites often end in .gov or .mil. Before sharing sensitive information, make sure you're on a federal government site. ![Image 3: SSL](https://www.fda.gov/themes/custom/preview/assets/images/icon-https.svg) **The site is secure.** The **https://** ensures that you are connecting to the official website and that any information you provide is encrypted and transmitted securely. [![Image 4: Food and Drug Administration Logo](https://www.fda.gov/themes/custom/preview/assets/images/FDA_Logo_Icon_White.svg)](https://www.fda.gov/ "FDA Homepage") * Search * Menu Search FDA Submit search ##
